ddls:
CREATE TABLE "fund_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund class */,
  "class_code" TEXT /* Code of the fund class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fund class */,
  "management_fee" REAL /* Management fee percentage */,
  "admin_fee" REAL /* Administrative fee percentage */,
  "mer" REAL /* Management Expense Ratio (MER) percentage */,
  "trailer_fee" REAL /* Trailer fee percentage */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the fund class was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the fund class */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the fund class (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial advisor, portfolio manager, compliance officer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund class being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the fund class */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the fund class was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string to identify the browser/device used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES fund_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fee_structures" (
  "fee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fee structure */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund class */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the fee structure */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the fee structure, to handle historical fee changes */,
  "management_fee" REAL /* Management fee percentage */,
  "admin_fee" REAL /* Administrative fee percentage */,
  "mer" REAL /* Management Expense Ratio (MER) percentage */,
  "trailer_fee" REAL /* Trailer fee percentage */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the fee structure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fee_structures_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fee_structures_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES fund_classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund class */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., add, edit, delete) */,
  "field_changed" TEXT /* Specific field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the changed field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  "change_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change, for audit purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES fund_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_class_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund class */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Effective date of the historical record */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for the historical record */,
  "management_fee" REAL /* Management fee percentage */,
  "admin_fee" REAL /* Administrative fee percentage */,
  "mer" REAL /* Management Expense Ratio (MER) percentage */,
  "trailer_fee" REAL /* Trailer fee percentage */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who created the historical record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_class_history_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES fund_classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_class_history_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Access level for the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON field to store detailed permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
